$schema: Static rubric. Scores live in assessment.json. History lives in assessment-history.json. nextActions are objects: { id, action, effort, requires?, satisfiedWhen? }. effort: 5min | 15min | 30min | 1hr | 2hr. noiseFloor (optional, default 5) sets the per-dimension trend sensitivity in points: deltas smaller than this and deltas without evidence changes render as 'flat' instead of '↗/↘'. satisfiedWhen is a predicate evaluated against signalsSummary at load time — when true, the action is hidden from priority lists / +10 paths and shown ✓ done on the dimension page. Grammar: 'path' (truthy), '!path' (falsy), 'path=v|w' (equals one of), 'path!=v', 'path>n' / '>=' / '<' / '<=', joined by ' & ' for AND. Only attach satisfiedWhen where signalsSummary precisely tells us the action is done — false positives erode trust faster than missed dismissals.
